title: cracca humilis
intro: Cracca humilis, also known as the Slender Bush Clover, is a perennial legume native to Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic, which helps to reduce fluid retention and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract issues. The health benefits of Cracca humilis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
